confidence.explanation: SPIKE ticket: AC-3 (documentation) is fully satisfied — approach documented in ticket comments before implementation. AC-1 and AC-2 (runtime behavior) are addressed by INV-558 (separately tested). API verification confirms POST /booking/search accepts idempotency_key field (200 response). Existing seed bookings lack the idempotency_key field because they predate the INV-552 DB migration — expected. Score deducted: (1) cannot trigger actual POST /booking timeout scenario in automated run (-12), (2) minor pre-existing a11y issues on calendar (-10).

test_cases.title: Create Reservation stepper is accessible and functional
test_cases.note: Stepper loads with all 5 steps (Reservation Details, Personal Info, Payment Info, Guest Info, Review). POST /booking/search returns 200 and accepts idempotency_key without error. Room availability search (POST /inventory/available/search) returns 200. All API calls on page load return 200.

test_cases.title: Spike approach is documented on ticket (AC-3)
test_cases.note: AC-3 SATISFIED: sang.nguyen documented why both FE-only paths (A: recover, B: retry) are blocked. Becca Manning confirmed INV-552 (idempotency key DB migration) was created as the chosen approach. Full analysis present in ticket comments before INV-558 implementation began.

test_cases.title: Dashboard and calendar load cleanly (regression smoke)
test_cases.note: Dashboard loads with Totem Lodge context, Check In/Check Out/Overview tabs visible. Calendar page loads. All navigation items accessible. No JS errors from app code.

test_cases.title: Universal — Console error scan
test_cases.note: One console error: Cognito favicon 404 (third-party OAuth page, allowlisted in console-allowlist.txt). No app-originated console errors.

test_cases.title: Universal — Network error scan
test_cases.note: All application API calls return 200. No non-2xx responses from xin-api-np.wbee.ca endpoints.

test_cases.title: Universal — Broken asset scan
test_cases.note: No broken images detected on calendar or create-reservation pages.

test_cases.title: Universal — Document lifecycle smoke
test_cases.note: Exempt: read-only spike verification run. No document edits performed. See exemption.md.

test_cases.title: Universal — Accessibility scan
test_cases.note: Pre-existing: 2 unlabeled inputs (calendar search + date picker) and generic page title. Not introduced by INV-536. Noted for a11y backlog.
